arts.ttl: Timo Werner set to return to RB Leipzig
arts.sum: After what will be remembered as a disappointing loan to Tottenham, Timo Werner is reportedly set to return to RB Leipzig in the summer.

arts.ttl: Match Preview: Borussia Dortmund Visit Leipzig
arts.sum: Leipzig still have one of the best forward lines in the Bundesliga with Xavi Simons, Ikoma Openda, and Benjamin Sesko all with ten or more goal involvements. In fact, Dortmund’s next seven matches come against FC Barcelona, Bayern Munich, and four teams ahead of Dortmund in the table.

arts.ttl: Match Ratings: BVB Comeback Sets Up Champions League Quarter-Final Against Barcelona
arts.sum: Kobel made an awful mistake to concede the opening goal five minutes into the game, and as much as he clawed a lot of that back with some good saves in the second half, it’s hard to look past that glaring error. BVB got off to a terrible start when multiple players came together to collectively gift Jonathan David the opening goal on the night just five minutes into the game.

arts.ttl: Report: Leipzig display interest in Club Brugge defender
arts.sum: Die Roten Bullen could be adding a talented Belgian international to their ranks ahead of next season.
